rows.notes: The text '1893.' and 'General Account' are visually aligned on the same horizontal plane, forming a single conceptual header for the page. 'gemini-flash' correctly combined these into one header row. 'gpt-5-mini' incorrectly split this into two separate header rows and mislocated 'General Account'.

Visually verified from the image, the pounds amount is clearly '101'. 'gemini-flash' correctly extracted '101' while 'gpt-5-mini' misread it as '10'. Both extractors correctly read the shillings and pence. The row is clearly an 'entry' with amounts in the left-hand column set.
rows.english_description: Receipt of composition dues (composition of dues received by the college).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt of composition dues, amounting to £101 6s 6d.

rows.notes: Amounts are clearly '101 6 6' and agreed upon by both extractors. 'gemini-flash' correctly identified this as a 'total' row, which is appropriate for 'Total Receipts', and accurately noted the amounts are aligned with the right set of columns. 'gpt-5-mini' incorrectly classified it as an 'entry'.

Amounts are clearly '251 15 .' (interpreted as 0 pence) and agreed upon. 'gemini-flash' accurately transcribed the description including the raised 't' in 'Acc't', and correctly classified it as a 'total' row, which is suitable for a balance entry. 'gpt-5-mini' missed the raised 't' and classified it as an 'entry'.

Description and amounts ('3548 16 3') are clearly visible and agreed upon by both extractors. 'gemini-flash' correctly classified this as a 'total' row, which is consistent with a balance figure, while 'gpt-5-mini' classified it as an 'entry'.

Amounts are clearly '3901 17 9' and agreed upon. 'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified the textual 'description' for this row as simply the '£' symbol, providing excellent reasoning by also performing a sum check which validates the amount. 'gemini-flash' incorrectly included the numerical amounts within the 'description' field. This final total is clearly on the 'right' side of the ledger.
